escalation.rationale: Russian jets dangerously intercepted UK aircraft, Trump sets Iran deadline amid day 82 of conflict, and Israel continues strikes on Lebanon despite ceasefire extension.

ticker_items: Russian jets intercept UK spy plane at 19 feet over Black Sea
Trump gives Iran '2-3 days' deadline for deal, warns of attacks
Israeli strikes kill 19 in southern Lebanon including children
Iran allows 24 ships through Hormuz Strait, oil prices drop 5%
Ukraine reportedly turning tide against Russian territorial gains

new_entrant.text: Pakistan deployed 8,000 troops and fighter jets to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty.

eastern_europe.description: Russia struggling to maintain territorial gains as Ukraine reportedly turns tide of war.

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrikes killed 19 people including women and children in southern Lebanon.
Israeli airstrikes killed 19 people including women and children
Israeli airstrikes kill at least 19 people including women and children despite ceasefire extension.

middle_east.target_location: Near Abu Dhabi Barakah nuclear plant
middle_east.description: Drone attack launched from Iraqi territory near UAE nuclear facility.

claimed_totals.figure: ~3,468 dead in Iran, ~3,042 dead in Lebanon, 28 in Gulf states

middle_east.text: Netanyahu will do 'whatever I want him to do' following 'dramatic' call about Iran strikes

observers.description: Pakistan deployed 8,000 troops, fighter jet squadron, and Chinese air defense systems to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. Deployments began in early April and enhance Pakistani military presence in the region.

Xi Jinping signed multiple deals with Putin during state visit, reportedly more than Trump secured during his China visit. Chinese tankers exiting Strait of Hormuz amid Iran tensions signals cautious approach.
Lithuanian officials were moved to safe locations due to drone activity near Belarus border. Residents in Vilnius were ordered to shelters amid heightened tensions on NATO's eastern flank.
Erdogan told Trump that extending Iran ceasefire is positive and contested issues can be resolved. Turkey's mediation efforts could stabilize regional tensions and reduce geopolitical risk.

financial.notes: Oil prices fell 5% and stock markets advanced as Iran allowed ships to transit Strait of Hormuz, easing supply concerns.
